implementing_department: Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India
description: Mission to increase production and productivity of crops through dissemination of improved technologies and farm management practices.
benefits: ₹6000 per ha for coarse cereals demonstration
Support for farm implements, bio-fertilizers, bio-pesticides
eligibility: Maximum assistance limited to 5 hectares per season
At least 33% allocation for small and marginal farmers
At least 30% allocation for women farmers

steps: Identification of beneficiaries by Gram Panchayat
Release of funds to State Governments
